submissions.title: To Debate a Zenin (AO3 Replica)
submissions.description: An Archive of Our Own (AO3) story page replication featuring the Jujutsu Kaisen fanfiction 'To Debate a Zenin'. Built with interactive Kudos, a Comments drawer, and responsive layouts.
